title: Visible diamonds
description: you will never miss diamonds again when mining
body:
This texture pack retextures all diamonds so that they are easyaly seen when mining! it makes them a solid bright blue color so you cant miss them.
![Normal diamonds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e68a02b0cc3a9bb3e123ea7f69e0ec94dff464cd_0.webp)![deepslate diamonds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bb3c30ad3d46131b4ce13cc3f6ea415a64f8ead_0.webp)

Thank you for respecting these terms and supporting my work!
